summary: Hand-authored `relations` command (list/set/unset issue relations) wired into root.go.
reason: The Plane CE REST surface exposes list + create on /work-items/{id}/relations/ but no flat UX and no DELETE; this command groups relations by type, adds a friendly `set`, and implements `unset` via a configurable Django-shell call (PLANE_RELATION_DELETE_SHELL).
validated_outcome: Builds against the reprinted context-aware client (Get/Post take context.Context); `relations list|set|unset` register and pass --help shape parity with the dogfooded CLI.
